pdg_node.statement: (seconds: float | array-like of floats) -> float | array-like of floats
pdg_node.informal_desc: Computes the relativistic time scale offset between Terrestrial Time (TT) and Barycentric Dynamical Time (TDB) in seconds, using a sinusoidal approximation of the periodic correction term derived from Earth's orbital eccentricity.

declaration.name: tt2tdb_offset
declaration.type_signature: (seconds: float | array-like of floats) -> float | array-like of floats
declaration.docstring: Computes the relativistic time scale offset between Terrestrial Time (TT) and Barycentric Dynamical Time (TDB) in seconds, using a sinusoidal approximation of the periodic correction term derived from Earth's orbital eccentricity.
declaration.conceptual_summary: PeriodicPhaseOffsetFromElapsedScalar. Maps a monotonically increasing scalar (elapsed time or phase accumulator) to a bounded periodic correction term by evaluating a sinusoidal function whose argument is a linear function of the input.
